title: Trump orders military to accelerate use of artificial intelligence
description: President Donald Trump is directing the U.S. military and national security agencies to speed up the adoption of AI. Here's what to know.
content:
President Donald Trump is calling for the U.S. Military and national security agencies to accelerate their use of artificial intelligence.

title: They Spent Years on a Math Problem. Then They Were Scooped by A.I.
description: Artificial intelligence is mastering the kinds of projects that have long helped to build the careers of young mathematicians. What does that mean for their future?
content:
Earlier this year, Sidharth Hariharan, a graduate student in mathematics at Carnegie Mellon University, received news sent him rushing into his adviser’s office with tears in his eyes.

title: Italy regulator drops investigation into Meta's WhatsApp AI bot
description: Italy's competition watchdog has closed its inquiry into Meta Platforms. The investigation concerned allegations of Meta abusing its dominant position. This involved installing its artificial intelligence tool on the WhatsApp messaging service. The Italian regulator, AGCM, decided to halt its probe. This action was taken because the European Commission has broadened its own investigation.
content:

title: Live updates: Apple's Tim Cook delivers WWDC26 keynote in his farewell as CEO
description: Apple CEO Tim Cook opens WWDC 2026 today at 1 p.m. ET, marking his final keynote before stepping down. Running June 8–12, the event offers a first look at software updates for iPhone, Mac, iPad, Watch, TV, and Vision Pro and a focus on artificial intelligence.
content:

content:

title: AI can reveal brain tumor risks without costly genetic testing
description: Mayo Clinic researchers and collaborators have shown that artificial intelligence (AI) can analyze routine pathology slides to help classify meningiomas, the most common primary brain tumor in adults, and predict a patient's risk of tumor recurrence.
content: Mayo Clinic researchers and collaborators have shown that artificial intelligence (AI) can analyze routine pathology slides to help classify meningiomas, the most common primary brain tumor in adults, and predict a patient's risk of tumor recurrence.... [3090 chars]
